events.summaryZh: Circular Quay 和 The Rocks 变成免费法国街头节：130 多个美食摊位、现场音乐、巡游表演和露天电影连在一起，适合全家边走边吃、傍晚看港景。
events.summaryEn: A free French street festival across Circular Quay and The Rocks with 130+ food stalls, live music, roaming performers and open-air cinema for an easy family harbour outing.
events.timeZh: 7月17日-19日；周五至周日，具体时段见官网
events.timeEn: 17-19 July; Friday to Sunday, see the official program for daily hours
events.priceEn: Free entry; food and drinks extra
events.referenceZh: The Rocks 官方活动页，核实日期为 2026年7月16日至19日。
events.referenceEn: The Rocks official event page; verified for 16-19 July 2026.

events.summaryZh: 鹅卵石街巷里有飘雪时刻、灯饰、欧洲风冬日市集、现场音乐和节日食物，和 Bastille Festival 同区，可一次走完两种气氛。
events.summaryEn: Snowfall moments, fairy lights, a European-style winter market, live music and festive food fill The Rocks, easy to combine with Bastille Festival nearby.
events.timeZh: 7月17日-19日；每日时间不同，出发前查看官网
events.timeEn: 17-19 July; daily hours vary, check the official page before leaving
events.placeZh: The Rocks Square 及周边街区
events.placeEn: The Rocks Square and surrounding laneways
events.priceEn: Free entry; food and drinks extra
events.referenceZh: The Rocks 官方活动页，核实活动持续至 2026年7月19日。
events.referenceEn: The Rocks official event page; verified through 19 July 2026.

events.titleZh: Family Sunday: 200 Years of the State Library
events.titleEn: Family Sunday: 200 Years of the State Library
events.summaryZh: 围绕州立图书馆 200 年历史做手工、绘画和未来图书馆设计，还可领取儿童探索卡逛馆，适合把室内活动和 Domain 散步组合成半日。
events.summaryEn: Craft, drawing, a future-library design activity and a kids' discovery trail celebrate 200 years of the State Library, with the Domain nearby for a half-day plan.
events.placeZh: State Library of NSW, Macquarie Street
events.placeEn: State Library of NSW, Macquarie Street
events.mapQuery: State Library of NSW Macquarie Street Sydney
events.referenceZh: City of Sydney What's On 与 State Library NSW 官方活动信息。
events.referenceEn: City of Sydney What's On and State Library NSW official event information.

events.summaryZh: 巨型发光海洋木偶在 Bondi Pavilion 周边巡游，孩子可以加入“海底生物”队伍；全龄友好，适合在海边吃饭后看一场免费冬日表演。
events.summaryEn: Giant illuminated sea-creature puppets roam around Bondi Pavilion and invite families into the underwater procession, an all-ages free finale by the beach.
events.mapQuery: Bondi Pavilion Queen Elizabeth Drive Bondi Beach
events.referenceZh: Waverley Council / Bondi Festival 官方活动信息。
events.referenceEn: Waverley Council and Bondi Festival official event information.

events.summaryZh: 不是普通安静观影，而是全场一起唱《Frozen》歌曲的复古影院场次；适合熟悉电影、愿意大声参与的孩子和大人。
events.summaryEn: A participatory Frozen screening in a classic cinema where families are encouraged to sing along, made for children and adults who know the songs.
events.mapQuery: Hayden Orpheum Picture Palace 380 Military Road Cremorne NSW
events.referenceZh: Hayden Orpheum 与 City of Sydney What's On 活动页。
events.referenceEn: Hayden Orpheum and City of Sydney What's On event listing.

events.summaryZh: 360 度太空互动装置让家庭在行星、月球和流星影像之间自己创造冒险，比单向看展更能让孩子走动参与。
events.summaryEn: A 360-degree interactive space lets families invent adventures among planets, moons, meteors and stars, with more movement and participation than a standard exhibition.
events.timeZh: 7月17日-19日及22日-24日 10:00am-5:00pm；周一、周二关闭
events.timeEn: 17-19 and 22-24 July, 10:00am-5:00pm; closed Monday and Tuesday
events.referenceZh: Carriageworks 与 City of Sydney What's On 官方活动信息。
events.referenceEn: Carriageworks and City of Sydney What's On official event information.

events.summaryZh: 在水族馆看真实海洋生物的同时做 Animal Crossing 集章任务、找角色并完成探索卡，适合喜欢游戏又需要全天候室内行程的家庭。
events.summaryEn: Explore real marine life while completing an Animal Crossing stamp rally, finding characters and earning a reward postcard, a weather-proof indoor family outing.
events.timeEn: 17-24 July; available during daily aquarium opening hours
events.placeZh: SEA LIFE Sydney Aquarium, Darling Harbour
events.placeEn: SEA LIFE Sydney Aquarium, Darling Harbour
events.mapQuery: SEA LIFE Sydney Aquarium 1-5 Wheat Road Sydney
events.referenceZh: SEA LIFE Sydney Aquarium 与 City of Sydney What's On 官方信息。
events.referenceEn: SEA LIFE Sydney Aquarium and City of Sydney What's On official information.

events.summaryZh: 小团参观穹顶和新旧望远镜，了解信号旗、天气观测和 Sydney Cove 科学史；楼梯较窄，更适合 6 岁以上孩子。
events.summaryEn: A small-group visit through the domes and telescopes, covering flag signalling, weather and Sydney Cove science history; best for ages 6+ due to narrow stairs.
events.timeZh: 7月17日、18日及24日；12:30pm-8:00pm 内按场次预订
events.timeEn: 17, 18 and 24 July; book a session within 12:30pm-8:00pm
events.mapQuery: Sydney Observatory Watson Road The Rocks NSW
events.referenceZh: Powerhouse 与 City of Sydney What's On 官方活动信息。
events.referenceEn: Powerhouse and City of Sydney What's On official event information.
